description_long: This object consists of four elongated, capsule-shaped balloons arranged in a cross or star-like formation, with their rounded ends radiating outward from a central point. Three of the balloons are a light purple color, while the fourth is a bright blue, creating a visually striking contrast. Each balloon has a subtle seam line near its tip, suggesting a typical latex balloon construction. The surface of the balloons is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving them a shiny, festive appearance. The overall form is playful and eye-catching, suitable for decorative use in urban parks, playgrounds, or event spaces. There are no visible strings, ribbons, or printed patterns on the balloons, and the attachment or knot area is not apparent.
description: A cluster of four glossy, capsule-shaped balloons—three purple and one blue—arranged in a cross formation with smooth, shiny surfaces and no visible strings or patterns.
description_view_0: From this view, three purple balloons and one blue balloon are visible, with the blue balloon extending to the left.
description_view_1: Here, the blue balloon is positioned to the right, with the three purple balloons forming the rest of the cross.
description_view_2: In this view, two blue balloons and two purple balloons are visible, with the blue balloons at the bottom and right.
description_view_3: This view shows the blue balloon at the bottom, with the three purple balloons forming the upper and side arms of the cross.
